g.title: asset.copy_alert:alert_type->config.copy_alert_type:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (alert_type) REFERENCES config.copy_alert_type(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: asset.copy_alert:create_staff->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (create_staff) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

g.title: asset.copy_alert:ack_staff->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (ack_staff) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
